context: Tests whether the agent includes resource requests/limits, liveness/readiness probes, non-root security context, specific version tags, namespace specification, and recommended label format.

checklist.name: Resource requests defined
checklist.description: Includes resources.requests with memory and cpu values

checklist.name: Resource limits defined
checklist.description: Includes resources.limits with memory and cpu values

checklist.name: Liveness probe configured
checklist.description: Includes livenessProbe with httpGet to /health endpoint on port 8080

checklist.name: Readiness probe configured
checklist.description: Includes readinessProbe with httpGet to /health endpoint on port 8080

checklist.name: Non-root security
checklist.description: Includes securityContext with runAsNonRoot or runAsUser set to non-zero

checklist.name: Recommended labels
checklist.description: Uses at least 3 of the app.kubernetes.io/* label format (name, instance, version, component, part-of, managed-by)

checklist.name: Current API version
checklist.description: Uses apps/v1 for Deployment (not deprecated extensions/v1beta1)

checklist.name: Probe timing configured
checklist.description: Includes initialDelaySeconds or periodSeconds on at least one probe
